title: Stinger moth
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Stinger moths''' were poisonous flying creatures that lived on [[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}
